pkgmetadata.longdescription: spglibPython bindings for C library for finding and handling crystalsymmetriesInstallation------------The package is developed on github. You can get the source for thereleased versions from therepository httpsgithub.comspglibspglibreleases__.Using package distribution serviceThe easiest way to install python-spglib is to use the pypi package, forwhich numpy is required to be installed before the installation. Acommand to install spglib is pip install spglibConda is another choice conda install -c conda-forge spglibThese packages are made by Pawel T. Jochym.
